result.reasoning: The question asks for the full name of the Speaker of the House of the U.S. Congress that passed the act appearing under the effective date of a change-of-name amendment in the document. Step 1 parsed the XML and found it is U.S. Code Title 1 with many amendment references. Step 2 extracted a specific change-of-name amendment: "Committee on International Relations of House of Representatives changed to Committee on Foreign Affairs of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 6, One Hundred Tenth Congress, Jan. 5, 2007." This amendment includes an effective date (Jan. 5, 2007) and references House Resolution No. 6 passed by the 110th Congress. Step 3 searched for details of House Resolution No. 6 and the 110th Congress, confirming the Speaker election on January 5, 2007, with Nancy Pelosi elected Speaker. Step 4 specifically searched for the Speaker of the House for the 110th Congress and obtained the full name: Nancy Patricia D'Alesandro Pelosi. Step 5 confirmed this full name. The answer is the full name of the Speaker, which is provided authoritatively with proper capitalization. Applied casing rule: authoritative casing from sources retained.
